revision.comment: [[Template:EstcatContinent]] now needs no parameters. It creates poartl links where appropriate., replaced: {{EstcatContinent|134|5|Asia}} → {{EstcatContinent}}
revision.text: {{EstcatContinent}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1345_establishments_in_Asia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{EstcatContinent}} {{wikidata link|Q25237842}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1345 establishments in Asia]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]]
